name: Daniels Missionary Baptist Church Gymnasium
description: Daniels Missionary Baptist Church Gymnasium is a place to play pickleball in Daniels, WV. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Glade Springs Resort
description: Glade Springs Resort is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Daniels, WV. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets.

name: New River Park
description: Come play pickleball at New River Park in Beckley, WV! There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: The Place
description: The Place is a place to play pickleball in Beckley, WV. There is 1 indoor wood court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms. The court is private.
